title: fix(desktop): seed custom constitution paths

codeRecommendation.reason: The implementation now creates parent directories for custom constitution YAML and Markdown paths, and review coverage proves same-directory and split-directory custom paths.

shipRecommendation.reason: This is a narrow local filesystem correctness fix for custom constitution storage. It should ship with the functional-labs train once Sebastian accepts the PR, but it does not require a standalone release cut.

reviewCoverageAddedByCodex: Added regression coverage for custom YAML and Markdown paths in separate nested parent directories.

proof.screenshotReason: Backend/local filesystem behavior; data proof is the relevant evaluation artifact.

verification.details: root typecheck pass; desktop/electron typecheck pass; bun test 277 pass, 1 skip, 0 fail, 948 expect calls; verify:v0 5 passed, 0 failed; devex mint validate pass; devex broken-links pass; electron build pass; bun audit no vulnerabilities
